question: Among the students who have an event record, who do not have a student loan? Return the students' biographical data.
sql: SELECT bio_data FROM Students WHERE student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM Student_Events) AND student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Student_Loans)

filters: student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Student_Loans)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求查询有事件记录但没有学生贷款的学生的生物数据，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、过滤条件和目标列均准确匹配。
